lead.description: [Interested in an investment? Upload and submit your pitch deck here.](https://masslight.com/upload-pitch-deck) [![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60c8df7a1b061d6ce5fe02e5/60cb4ba9e95d395b06568f20_5be31daa7cd72b01772def4e_masslight-logo%20dark-1.png)](https://masslight.com/) [Programs](https://masslight.com/programs) Products [Ottehr](https://masslight.com/products/ottehr)[Oystehr](https://masslight.com/products/oystehr) [FAQ](https://masslight.com/build-for-equity-faq) [Portfolio](https://masslight.com/projects) [Healthcare Startups](https://masslight.com/healthcare-startups)[Portfolio Startups](https://masslight.com/projects) [Mentors](https://masslight.com/mentors)[Apply for Investment](https://www.masslight.com/program-application) [Programs](https://www.masslight.com/programs)[FAQ](https://www.masslight.com/build-for-equity-faq) Portfolio [Healthcare Startups](https://masslight.com/healthcare-startups)[Portfolio Startups](https://www.masslight.com/projects?tab=current-startups) [Mentors](https://masslight.com/mentors)[Blog](https://www.masslight.com/blog-news)[Apply](https://www.masslight.com/program-application) startup investor # We invest capital and engineers, in exchange for equity. We're not just advising startups, we're building them. [Apply for Investment](https://www.masslight.com/program-application) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2f432681272_Untitled%20design%20\(2\)%20copy%204.png) ### Our Products At Masslight, we’re reimagining healthcare technology to give providers and developers control over their digital tools. Our projects, Ottehr and Oystehr, are designed to streamline clinical workflows, foster customization, and support seamless interoperability—empowering healthcare teams to deliver better care without technical limitations. ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/6683027697ba095ce3978891_oystehr-logo-horizontal-transparent-2%20\(1\).png) A headless cloud service offering developers and builders all the APIs and infrastructure necessary to create next generation health tech and EHRs. [Learn More](https://masslight.com/products/oystehr) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/66830333130acd9fc90f042d_image.png) Ottehr is the first FHIR-native EHR. Its great out-of-the-box or to customize, adapt, improve, and white-label. Usefor your data store or use your own. [Learn More](https://masslight.com/products/ottehr) #### We've pioneered a new build-for-equity model with a rapidly expanding portfolio. [Check out our past startups](https://www.masslight.com/projects?tab=past-startups) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e21909681266_image%20\(1\)%20copy.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e270df68126c_Pacify-Standard_Purple.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/62ce8b8ef27d05221e29a368_pmp.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e25d7568125f_logo-1.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2006d68126a_logo.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e26bee681271_svg_gs-pro-logo-color-1.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e26e80681276_fs-logo.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/62291ce9e545380672f68860_wff-logo.png) build-for-equity # Programs for early stage startups. We help you launch and scale, then we introduce you to investors and acquirers. #### Idea stage ### 3% equity Valuations up to 3M You have an idea and the background for success. ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) MassLight invests 50 service hours ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) and invests $7,500 cash ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) No fees ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Landing page marketing ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Refine your pitch deck ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Financial modeling ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Access to mentors #### Discovery stage ### 6% equity Valuations up to 5M You have a pitch deck, founders who can sell the product, financial models and indicators of traction. ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) MassLight invests 400 service hours ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) and invests $15,000 cash ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) No fees ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Clickable mockups ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Facilitate introductions ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Marketing plan ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Help acquiring pre-sales ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Help with UX/UI ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Access to mentors #### Build stage ### 20% equity Valuations up to 15M You have detailed mockups and pre-sales commitments. Now you're ready to deliver product to initial customers. ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) MassLight invests 3,000 to 5,000 service hours ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) and invests up to $100,000 cash ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) No fees ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Dedicated tech team builds your product ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d632a10743e2798968125e_Checkbox%20Tick.svg) Access to mentors ### **How Build-for-Equity Works** Click the link below for more information on how we help startups through our Build-For-Equity program! [How It Works ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60c8df7a1b061d6ce5fe02e5/60c8df7a1b061d4f2cfe0361_Chevron%20\(Brand\).svg)](https://masslight.com/how-we-work) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60c8df7a1b061d6ce5fe02e5/60c8df7a1b061da9f4fe03a6_Icon%20Reliable.svg) ##### Dedicated Tech Team MassLight supplies a dedicated tech team to build and maintain your software product. ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60c8df7a1b061d6ce5fe02e5/60c8df7a1b061d78a5fe03a3_Icon%20Quality.svg) ##### Cash Investment MassLight supplies varying amounts of cash depending on your startup's stage. ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60c8df7a1b061d6ce5fe02e5/60c8df7a1b061d7561fe0365_Icon%20Communication.svg) ##### Mentors We have a team of experienced mentors available to help you through various challenges. [**View Mentors**](https://masslight.com/mentors) steps ### The Process After you apply to the MassLight program here's what you can expect. 01 ##### Application Submit your application to MassLight. Our team will review your application and reach out. ‍ [Apply ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d634d387b38ed93e1e0c82_Chevron%20\(Brand\).svg)](https://www.masslight.com/program-application) 02 ##### Interview We'll review your submission and may schedule additional interviews. ‍ [Apply ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d634d387b38ed93e1e0c82_Chevron%20\(Brand\).svg)](https://www.masslight.com/program-application) 03 ##### Let's start When we've completed interviews, you'll have chance to formally pitch. This is the last step before we start working. [Apply ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d634d387b38ed93e1e0c82_Chevron%20\(Brand\).svg)](https://www.masslight.com/program-application) MENTORS AVAILABLE DURING OFFICE HOURS ### Here to help you scale ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d635b92c81c0050fed547d_DanielAbramsPhot.jpg) Daniel Abrams CEO & CTO Daniel Abrams is the CEO of MassLight and acting CTO for many startups. He holds a degree in anthropology, was a software engineer at Apple, and founded MassLight’s build-for-equity program to support founders struggling with tech. ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d635b92c81c0718eed5481_alex%20\(1\).jpg) Alex Willingham Engineering Alex Willingham is the lead engineer of MassLight’s Build for Equity Team. He specializes in helping companies figure out what software not to build. He is an expert in startup tech from cloud architecture to coding. ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5bdf380116cdd679251c293a/60d635b92c81c0881aed5476_Image%20from%20iOS%20\(3\)%20copy%203.jpg) Sarah Mooney Marketing Sarah Mooney is the Director of Marketing at MassLight. She is a full-stack digital marketer. You can expect her to help you with your go-to market strategy, acquiring your first customers and improving your acquisition costs. # Working on a healthcare startup? We're experienced healthcare investors MassLight provides product teams to help qualified founders launch digital health startups. This means designers, software engineers, QA, cybersecurity, compliance and product experts. [Learn More ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60c8df7a1b061d6ce5fe02e5/60c8df7a1b061d4f2cfe0361_Chevron%20\(Brand\).svg)](https://masslight.com/healthcare-startups) ##### We love helping startups. why masslight? #### We're only successful if you are. est. 2000 Since 2000 we've been building sophisticated software. Users 10M+ The products we've built serve over 10,000,000 users. partners 90+ We're partnered with over 90 US-based VC's. Which means, we have the relationships to help you gain funding. [Apply for Investment](https://www.masslight.com/program-application) ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60c8df7a1b061d6ce5fe02e5/60c8df7a1b061d8a66fe037d_Job%20List%20Pattern%20\(Dark\).svg) ### Submit your startup to MassLight Apply to any of our programs by submitting an application for your startup.
